name: RH | 2026-06 Farewell Weekend + Glow Up Tease
resultNotes: Repaired exemplar for the farewell_sellthrough objective. Source design (Notion id 375fdc24-425f-8185-87fd-e75630c999eb) was rebuilt from group-prefixed components after a hand-coded-HTML regression. Replace this seed with the live exported design once reconciled.

campaign.campaignName: RH | 2026-06 Farewell Weekend + Glow Up Tease

tokens.HEADLINE: The last of the Rosehaven blooms
tokens.SUBHEADLINE: Our Rosehaven range is retiring this weekend. One final gather before it’s gone for good — thank you for loving it as much as we did.

tokens.HEADLINE: Three years of Rosehaven
tokens.BODY_P1: When we first dreamed up Rosehaven, we wanted a bouquet that felt like a slow Sunday morning — soft, generous, a little wild. You made it one of our most-gifted arrangements ever.
tokens.BODY_P2: This weekend is your last chance to send one. After Sunday, Rosehaven retires to make room for what’s blooming next.

tokens.HEADLINE: Why we’re saying goodbye to Rosehaven
tokens.BODY_P1: Retiring a range we love is never easy, but it’s how we keep every bouquet feeling fresh and seasonal for you.
tokens.BODY_P2: Something new is already on the bench — a little glow-up we can’t wait to show you very soon.
